rationale: Chemical & Bioengineering merges chemical engineering with biotechnology and biomedical engineering at level 1. Twelve subspecialties split by industry-end (process, biotech, biomedical, environmental) and by methodology (catalysis-engineering, separations, transport). I made Synthetic Biology Engineering distinct from Synthetic Biology under Biology — there the lens is basic-science, here it's industrial application. Same logic for Tissue Engineering vs. Biomaterials in Materials Science (biomaterials is the substrate, tissue engineering is the device).

subspecialties.name: Process Systems Engineering
covers: chemical process design, process control, process optimization, scheduling, supply chain in chemical processing, digital twins of plants
Ind Eng Chem Res, Comp Chem Eng

subspecialties.name: Reaction Engineering & Catalysis Engineering
subspecialties.tagline: Reactor design, catalyst supports, kinetics, scale-up.
covers: reactor design, catalyst engineering (supports, particles), reaction kinetics in engineering, multi-phase reactor modeling, scale-up
Chem Eng Sci, AIChE J, Ind Eng Chem Res

subspecialties.name: Separations & Purification
covers: distillation, membrane separations, adsorption, crystallization engineering, extraction, hybrid separations
J Membr Sci, Sep Purif Technol

subspecialties.name: Transport Phenomena
subspecialties.tagline: Heat/mass/momentum transfer in chemical and biological systems.
covers: heat, mass and momentum transfer in chemical and biological systems, multiphase transport, mixing, residence time distributions
Chem Eng Sci transport
explicitly_excludes: fluid mechanics engineering → Mechanical & Aerospace Engineering

subspecialties.name: Industrial Biotechnology
covers: industrial fermentation, bioprocess engineering, enzyme engineering, cell culture engineering, biomanufacturing scale-up
Biotechnol Bioeng, AIChE bioeng

subspecialties.name: Synthetic Biology Engineering
subspecialties.tagline: Engineered cells, metabolic engineering, genetic circuits applied.
covers: metabolic engineering for production, engineered microbial cell factories, applied genetic circuits, CRISPR for production, cell-free biomanufacturing
ACS Synth Biol applied, Metab Eng

subspecialties.name: Drug Delivery & Pharmaceutical Engineering
subspecialties.tagline: Formulation, controlled release, lipid nanoparticles, oral biopharmaceutics.
covers: pharmaceutical formulation, controlled and targeted drug delivery, lipid nanoparticles (LNPs), inhaled drug delivery, oral biopharmaceutics, mRNA delivery engineering
J Control Release, Mol Pharm, Int J Pharm

subspecialties.name: Tissue Engineering & Regenerative Engineering
covers: tissue engineering scaffolds (engineering angle), organ-on-chip, organoid engineering, regenerative engineering devices, 3D bioprinting of tissues
Tissue Eng, Acta Biomater engineering

subspecialties.name: Biomedical Devices & Instrumentation
subspecialties.tagline: Implants, surgical devices, medical instrumentation engineering.
covers: medical device engineering, surgical robot integration, implantable devices engineering, biomedical instrumentation, diagnostic device engineering
T-BME devices, Ann Biomed Eng

subspecialties.name: Environmental & Sustainable Chemical Engineering
subspecialties.tagline: Wastewater, CO2 capture, green processes, circular chem-eng.
covers: wastewater treatment process engineering, CO2 capture and utilization, green process engineering, circular economy in chemicals, sustainable process design
Environ Sci Tech eng, ACS Sustain Chem Eng eng

subspecialties.name: Energy & Process Engineering for Fuels
covers: petroleum refining engineering, biofuel process engineering, hydrogen production (electrolysis, SMR), e-fuels, syngas processing

subspecialties.name: Computational Chemical Engineering & ML
subspecialties.tagline: CFD for processes, ML for process control, digital twins.
covers: CFD for chemical processes, ML applied to chemical engineering, digital twin development for chemical processes, multi-scale modeling in chem-eng
explicitly_excludes: pure ML methodology → Computer Science & AI

uncovered_concerns: Considered Cell & Gene Therapy Engineering as its own card — overlaps Industrial Biotechnology + Tissue Engineering. For now folds across both depending on focus.
Considered Particle Technology — folds under Reaction Engineering or Separations.
Considered Nuclear Chemical Engineering — small; folds under Energy & Process Engineering for Fuels.
